testcase.name: WeSendCV smoke checks › homepage loads, title and main visible, save screenshot
WeSendCV smoke checks › invalid page returns 404 error
WeSendCV smoke checks › can click first job link and navigate to job details

failure.message: wesendcv.spec.ts:37:7 can click first job link and navigate to job details

testcase.failure: [chromium] › wesendcv.spec.ts:37:7 › WeSendCV smoke checks › can click first job link and navigate to job details TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('.tpg-post-link').first() - locator resolved to ⇆⇆↵⇆⇆ - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 19 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not visible - retrying click action - waiting 500ms at pages\WeSendCVPage.ts:59 57 | */ 58 | async clickFirstJobLink() { > 59 | await this.page.locator('.tpg-post-link').first().click(); | ^ 60 | } 61 | 62 | /** at WeSendCVPage.clickFirstJobLink (C:\Playwright-AI-Agent-POM-MCP-Server\tests\pages\WeSendCVPage.ts:59:55) at C:\Playwright-AI-Agent-POM-MCP-Server\tests\wesendcv.spec.ts:43:24 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\wesendcv-WeSendCV-smoke-ch-7d7e1-and-navigate-to-job-details-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\wesendcv-WeSendCV-smoke-ch-7d7e1-and-navigate-to-job-details-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: WeSendCV smoke checks › homepage URL matches configured home URL
